calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Robert Cohen, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff, AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) NICHOLAS LAWRENCE, aka NICHOLAS A. LAWRENCE.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $84,105.65
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $664.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $84,770.15
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Continued To Nov-27-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
